title: Rahu Chalisa
intro: Shri Rahu Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Lord Rahu
description:
|| Shri Kuber Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Jaise atal Himalaya aur jaise adig Sumer
Aise hi swarg dwar pai, avichal khade Kuber
Vighna haran mangal karan, suno sharanagat ki ter
Bhakta hetu vitran karo, dhan maya ke dher

|| Chaupai ||
Jai jai jai Shri Kuber Bhandari
Dhan maya ke tum adhikari
Tap tej punj nirbhay bhay hari
Pawan veg sam tanu baldhari
Swarg dwar ki karen pehre dari
Sevak Indra dev ke agyakari
Yaksha yakshani ki hai sena bhari
Senapati bane yuddh mein dhanudhari
Maha yoddha ban shastra dharain
Yuddh karain shatru ko marain
Sada vijayi kabhi na haarain
Bhagat janon ke sankat taarain
Prapitamah hain swayam vidhata
Pulista vansh ke janm vikhyata
Vishrava pita Idvida ji mata
Vibhishan bhagat aapke bhrata
Shiv charnon mein jab dhyan lagaya
Ghor tapasya kari tan ko sukhaya
Shiv vardaan mile devatya paya
Amrit paan kari amar hui kaya
Dharm dhwaja sada liye hath mein
Devi devta sab phirain saath mein
Pitambar vastra pehne gaat mein
Bal shakti puri yaksha jaat mein
Swarn sinhasan aap virajain
Trishul gada hath mein sajain
Shankh mridang nagare bajain
Gandharva raag madhur swar gajain
Chaunsath yogani mangal gaavain
Riddhi Siddhi nit bhog lagaavain
Daas daasni sir chhatra phiravain
Yaksha yakshani mil chanvar dhulavain
Rishiyon mein jaise Parashuram bali hain
Devanh mein jaise Hanuman bali hain
Purushon mein jaise Bhim bali hain
Yakshon mein aise hi Kuber bali hain
Bhagaton mein jaise Prahlad bade hain
Pakshiyon mein jaise Garuda bade hain
Nagon mein jaise Shesh bade hain
Vaise hi bhagat Kuber bade hain
Kaandhe dhanush hath mein bhala
Gale phoolon ki pehni mala
Swarn mukut aru deh vishala
Door door tak hoye ujala
Kuber dev ko jo man mein dhare
Sada vijay ho kabhi na haare
Bigde kaam ban jaayen saare
Ann dhan ke rahen bhare bhandare
Kuber garib ko aap ubharain
Kuber karz ko shighra utarain
Kuber bhagat ke sankat taarain
Kuber shatru ko kshan mein maarain
Shighra dhani jo hona chahe
Kyun nahin yaksha Kuber manayein
Yeh paath jo padhe padhaein
Din duguna vyapar badhaein
Bhoot pret ko Kuber bhagavain
Ade kaam ko Kuber banavain
Rog shok ko Kuber nashavain
Kalank kodh ko Kuber hatavain
Kuber chadhe ko aur chadade
Kuber gire ko punah utha de
Kuber bhagya ko turant jaga de
Kuber bhoole ko raah bata de
Pyase ki pyas Kuber bujha de
Bhukhe ki bhookh Kuber mita de
Rogi ka rog Kuber ghata de
Dukhiya ka dukh Kuber chhutade
Baanjh ki god Kuber bhara de
Karobar ko Kuber badha de
Karagar se Kuber chhudade
Chor thagon se Kuber bacha de
Court case mein Kuber jitavain
Jo Kuber ko man mein dhyavain
Chunav mein jeet Kuber karavain
Mantri pad par Kuber bithavain
Paath kare jo nit man layi
Uski kala ho sada savayi
Jispe prasann Kuber ki mai
Uska jeevan chale sukhdayi
Jo Kuber ka paath karavain
Uska beda paar lagavain
Ujde ghar ko punah basavain
Shatru ko bhi mitra banavain
Sahastra pustak jo daan karayi
Sab sukh bhog padarth pai
Pran tyag kar swarg mein jai
Manas parivar Kuber kirti gayi

|| Doha ||
Shiv bhakton mein agrani, Shri Yakshraj Kuber
Hriday mein gyan prakash bhar, kar do door andher
Kar do door andher ab, jara karo na der
Sharan pada hoon aapki, daya ki drishti pher
meaning:
|| Shri Rahu Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Namo namo Shri Rahu sukhakari
(Salutations again and again to the bringer of happiness, Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi kashton ko harne wale
(You are the one who removes all troubles.)
Bhakton ko sukh dene wale
(You are the giver of happiness to your devotees.)
Jayati jayati Shri Rahu Maharaj
(Victory, victory to you, O Lord Rahu.)
Bhav bandhan se karte sabka uddhar
(You liberate everyone from the shackles of worldly attachments.)

|| Chaupai ||
Jayati jayati Shri Rahu dayala
(Victory to you, O merciful Rahu.)
Sada bhaktan ke sankat hara
(You are always the remover of your devotees' crises.)
Sarpakar phani dhar shesha
(You are serpent-formed and possessor of hoods like Shesha.)
Rahu dev sankat harnevala
(O Lord Rahu, you are the remover of crises.)
Sir kate par dhad na chhoda
(Even when the head was severed, you did not abandon the torso.)
Amrit paan kiya sant moda
(You consumed the nectar and altered the path of saints.)
Rahu Ketu kaalgrah jaane
(Rahu and Ketu are known as the planets of Time/Fate.)
Sabhi sankaton ko door bhagane
(You are known for driving away all crises.)
Sarpakar chhaya grah maane
(You are considered a serpent-shaped shadow planet.)
Sabhi janon ke dukh har jaane
(You are known for removing the sorrows of all people.)
Ketu Rahu sangram machaya
(Rahu and Ketu created a great battle.)
Devtaon ko bhi daraya
(You even struck fear into the gods.)
Bhanu graas Chandra ko dhaya
(You rushed to eclipse the Sun and Moon.)
Sabhi grahon par prabhav dikhaya
(You demonstrated your influence upon all the planets.)
Rahu-Ketu chhaya grah bhare
(Rahu and Ketu are powerful shadow planets.)
Sabhi grahon mein Rahu nyare
(Among all the planets, Rahu is unique.)
Rahu dosh jo janam kundali
(If there is a Rahu defect in the birth chart.)
Rahu Chalisa karein nirantar
(One should recite the Rahu Chalisa continuously.)
Jeevan mein sabhi kasht mitave
(It wipes away all the troubles in life.)
Rahu dev kripa barsave
(Lord Rahu showers his grace.)
Bhakt jo Rahu dev ko dhyave
(The devotee who meditates upon Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi sankaton ko har lave
(Removes all their crises.)
Rahu grah ka prabhav hatave
(You remove the negative influence of the planet Rahu.)
Sabhi janon ko sukh dilave
(You bring happiness to all people.)
Kaalsarp dosh bhi tare
(You also remove the Kaalsarp defect.)
Rahu Chalisa jo jan gave
(The person who sings this Rahu Chalisa.)
Rahu grah ke mantra jape jo
(Whoever chants the mantras of planet Rahu.)
Jeevan mein sab sukh pave so
(They attain all happiness in life.)
Shatru se jo bhaybheet hove
(Whoever is afraid of enemies.)
Rahu dev ka dhyan dharave
(Should meditate upon Lord Rahu.)
Rahu dev ki sharan jo ave
(Whoever comes under the refuge of Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi kashton se mukti pave
(Attains liberation from all troubles.)
Rahu dev ka dhyan lagave
(By meditating on Lord Rahu.)
Jeevan mein sukh shanti pave
(One attains happiness and peace in life.)
Rahu dev ka yash gave
(Whoever sings the glory of Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi sankat door bhagave
(Drives all crises far away.)
Bhakti bhav se Rahu dev ko
(With devotion towards Lord Rahu.)
Jo bhi bhakt sumire man mein
(Whichever devotee remembers him in their mind.)
Sabhi sankat kasht mitave
(Wipes out all crises and troubles.)
Rahu dev kripa barsave
(Lord Rahu showers his grace.)
Rahu dev ki sharan jo ave
(Whoever comes under the refuge of Lord Rahu.)
Jeevan mein sabhi sukh pave
(Attains all happiness in life.)
Rahu dev ka yash gave
(Whoever sings the glory of Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi sankat door bhagave
(Drives all crises far away.)
Kripa drishti Rahu dev ki
(The grace of Lord Rahu.)
Jo bhi bhakt man mein dhyave
(Whoever the devotee meditates upon in their mind.)
Rahu dev ke charanon mein
(At the feet of Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi bhakt sheesh navave
(All devotees bow their heads.)
Bhanu Chandra jo Rahu grase
(Rahu, who eclipses the Sun and Moon.)
Sabhi grahon par Rahu base
(Rahu resides upon all the planets.)
Rahu dev ki mahima nyari
(The glory of Lord Rahu is unique.)
Sabhi grahon mein Rahu bhari
(Among all planets, Rahu is the most powerful/weighty.)
Sarpakar Rahu dev ka
(Of the serpent-formed Lord Rahu.)
Jo bhi bhakt sumire man mein
(Whichever devotee remembers him in their mind.)
Rahu grah ka dosh mitave
(Wipes out the defect of planet Rahu.)
Sabhi janon ko sukh dilave
(Brings happiness to all people.)

|| Doha ||
Namo namo Shri Rahu sukhakari
(Salutations again and again to the bringer of happiness, Lord Rahu.)
Sabhi kashton ko harne wale
(The remover of all troubles.)
Bhakton ko sukh dene wale
(The giver of happiness to devotees.)
Jayati jayati Shri Rahu Maharaj
(Victory, victory to you, O Lord Rahu.)
Bhav bandhan se karte sabka uddhar
(You liberate everyone from the shackles of worldly attachments.)

faq.q1: Why is the Rahu Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: Rahu is considered the planet of illusion and confusion. This Chalisa is recited to pacify the malefic effects of Rahu (Rahu Dosha), clear mental confusion, and protect against sudden obstacles in life.
faq.q2: What is the most auspicious day to recite the Rahu Chalisa?
faq.a2: Saturday is considered the best day to seek the blessings of Rahu Dev. Additionally, reciting it during the 'Rahu Kaal' (a specific period of the day) is also considered effective.
faq.q3: Does the Rahu Chalisa help in removing confusion and fear?
faq.a3: Yes, the negative influence of Rahu often causes unnecessary fear and illusion. Regular recitation helps calm the mind and improves the power of decision-making.
faq.q4: Should any special precautions be taken while reading it?
faq.a4: Maintain complete faith while reciting the Rahu Chalisa. It should be read for self-protection and peace, not with the intent to harm others.
faq.q5: Can any ordinary person recite it?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone can recite it. It is a prayer meant to reduce negative energy and bring positivity into one's life.
